name: Menu_Aut_Liq_Serv
wl_code:
nProcesar is int=0
IF sIdentifier="81" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 81, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 82, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 83, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 82, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 83, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE IF sIdentifier="82" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 82, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
ELSE IF sIdentifier="83" THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 83, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
nProcesar=1
END
IF nProcesar=1 THEN
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 82, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado82 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 83, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
nEstado83 is int=TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 81, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF nEstado82=1 AND nEstado83=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
ELSE IF nEstado82=0 AND nEstado83=0 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
ELSE IF nEstado82=1 OR nEstado83=1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1

END
END
